---
title: "posts"
listing:
  contents: posts #This should match the post Directory
  sort: 
    - "date"
    - "title desc"
  type: default
  image-align: right
  max-description-length: 175
  date-format: medium
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---
